description: Footer icons section displaying university award badges and social media channel links, always rendered with fixed static content.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard footer icons section with award badges and social media links as seen across the university site

notes: Content is fully static across all 26,276 pages (duplicates:14, textVaries:false — only 1 unique DOM structure observed). The social icons are wrapped in Drupal CMS embed markup (.embedded-entity, .media--image--figure, figure.imgcapt) which should be reproduced faithfully. The social links region also contains Drupal region wrappers: div.region.region-footer_last and div.block.block-layout-builder.block-field-blockblock-contentbasicbody. These Drupal wrapper classes must be preserved in the output.
